case_title: SIMCOFF, DANIEL VS BARCLAY, ROBERT C/O SAN FRANCISCO DENTAL OFFICE

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BARCLAY, ROBERT  C/O SAN FRANCISCO DENTAL OFFICE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SIMCOFF, DANIEL AS TO DEFENDANT BARCLAY, ROBERT  C/O SAN FRANCISCO DENTAL OFFICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-14-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 01

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIMCOFF, DANIEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARCLAY, ROBERT  C/O SAN FRANCISCO DENTAL OFFICE $3,050.00 PRINCIPAL, $39.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,089.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT BARCLAY, ROBERT  C/O SAN FRANCISCO DENTAL OFFICE
